title: Cream's Majora's Mask Renames
description: Simple Java resource pack that adds renamable items from Majora's Mask to minecraft.
body:
Compatible renames are listed in the second image of the gallery. If you've played Majora's Mask they should be self explanatory.

Doesn't require any mods to use properly, however if you use OptiFine (or another mod that allows for compatible emissive textures) then the eyes on Majora's Mask will glow.

Also the pack should work in any version after 1.21.4, but **I'd strongly recommend using it in 1.21.11+** since in older versions of the game the items still have stitching issues and look absolutely terrible with the larger swords in this pack.


If you want to use any of the assets provided in this pack, consult the following:

- If it's for personal, private use, you are free to do so as you please.
- If it's for a public project, credit my work under the name "PurpleGreenCream"
